tasks.title: Live test development brief form on MochaHost
tasks.description: Submit the /development brief form on the live MojoAiStudio.com server and verify the full email flow: form submits successfully, confirmation page appears, admin email arrives at admin@MojoAiStudio.com with all submitted data, and auto-reply arrives at the submitter's inbox.
tasks.plan:
## Overview

Pure verification task — api/submit-brief.php is already built and deployed. This task confirms the live email flow works on MochaHost: form submits, admin notification arrives at admin@MojoAiStudio.com, and auto-reply arrives at the submitter.

## Phases

1. Pre-test verification: confirm /development loads and .htaccess routes POST to PHP handler
2. Form submission test: fill required fields, submit, verify 200 {"ok":true} and confirmation redirect
3. Email delivery: verify admin notification and auto-reply in both inboxes (not spam)
4. Result documentation: record proof unit pass/fail in backlog.json

## First Proof Unit

Load MojoAiStudio.com/development → DevTools Network tab → confirm 200 on page load and X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff in POST response headers (confirms PHP handler is reachable).

proofUnits.title: Live routing and PHP handler reachable
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: GET /development returns 200 and the brief form page renders; POST /api/submit-brief reaches the PHP handler (not a 404).
proofUnits.exactCommand:
1. Open MojoAiStudio.com/development in browser
2. Open DevTools → Network tab
3. Confirm page load returns HTTP 200
4. Confirm no console errors indicating missing resources
5. Inspect POST response headers — confirm X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff is present (set by submit-brief.php)
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: Page 404s, or response headers lack X-Content-Type-Options indicating PHP is not routing.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: 200 on /development; X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff in POST response headers.

proofUnits.title: Form submits and confirmation page appears
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: Filling all required fields and clicking Submit redirects to /development/pages/confirmation.html with no errors.
proofUnits.exactCommand:
1. Open MojoAiStudio.com/development → click Start a project
2. Fill: Project Name, Contact Name, Contact Email (use ravenshroud@gmail.com), Problem Description
3. Click Submit
4. DevTools Network tab → confirm POST /api/submit-brief returns 200 with {"ok":true}
5. Confirm browser redirects to /development/pages/confirmation.html
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: POST returns 500 or network error; page does not redirect.

proofUnits.title: Admin email and auto-reply both delivered
proofUnits.expectedBehavior: admin@MojoAiStudio.com receives brief email with all submitted fields; submitter receives auto-reply.
proofUnits.exactCommand:
1. After PU2 form submission
2. Check admin@MojoAiStudio.com inbox — confirm email with subject [Mojo Brief] containing submitted data
3. Check SPAM folder if not in inbox
4. Check ravenshroud@gmail.com inbox — confirm auto-reply received
5. Verify Reply-To on admin email points to submitter address
proofUnits.expectedInitialFailure: No email received; email in spam; fields missing from email body.
proofUnits.expectedPassingEvidence: Both emails arrive in inbox with correct content and addressing.
proofUnits.waiverGuidance: If email goes to spam, note MochaHost server reputation issue and log SPF/DKIM setup as a new backlog task.
